1: use anyhow::{Result, bail};
2: use std::path::PathBuf;
3: 
4: use crate::ui;
5: 
6: /// Returns the user-level ez config directory (~/.ez/).
7: fn ez_home() -> Result<PathBuf> {
8:     let home = std::env::var("HOME")
9:         .map_err(|_| anyhow::anyhow!("could not determine home directory ($HOME not set)"))?;
10:     Ok(PathBuf::from(home).join(".ez"))
11: }
12: 
13: /// Returns true if `ez setup` has already been run.
14: pub fn is_setup_done() -> bool {
15:     ez_home()
16:         .map(|p| p.join(".setup-done").exists())
17:         .unwrap_or(false)
18: }
19: 
20: fn mark_setup_done() -> Result<()> {
21:     let dir = ez_home()?;
22:     std::fs::create_dir_all(&dir)?;
23:     std::fs::write(dir.join(".setup-done"), "")?;
24:     Ok(())
25: }
26: 
27: fn detect_shell() -> Option<String> {
28:     std::env::var("SHELL")
29:         .ok()
30:         .and_then(|s| detect_shell_name(&s).map(str::to_string))
31: }
32: 
33: fn detect_shell_name(shell: &str) -> Option<&str> {
34:     let name = shell.rsplit('/').next().unwrap_or(shell);
35:     match name {
36:         "bash" | "zsh" | "fish" => Some(name),
37:         _ => None,
38:     }
39: }
40: 
41: fn rc_file_for(shell: &str) -> Option<PathBuf> {
42:     let home = std::env::var("HOME").ok()?;
43:     rc_file_for_home(shell, PathBuf::from(home), None)
44: }
45: 
46: fn rc_file_for_home(shell: &str, home: PathBuf, bashrc_exists: Option<bool>) -> Option<PathBuf> {
47:     match shell {
48:         "zsh" => Some(home.join(".zshrc")),
49:         "bash" => {
50:             let bashrc = home.join(".bashrc");
51:             let exists = bashrc_exists.unwrap_or_else(|| bashrc.exists());
52:             if exists {
53:                 Some(bashrc)
54:             } else {
55:                 Some(home.join(".bash_profile"))
56:             }
57:         }
58:         "fish" => Some(home.join(".config/fish/config.fish")),
59:         _ => None,
60:     }
61: }
62: 
63: fn shell_init_line(shell: &str) -> String {
64:     match shell {
65:         "fish" => "ez shell-init | source".to_string(),
66:         _ => r#"eval "$(ez shell-init)""#.to_string(),
67:     }
68: }
69: 
70: fn path_export_line(shell: &str, install_dir: &str) -> String {
71:     match shell {
72:         "fish" => format!("fish_add_path {install_dir}"),
73:         _ => format!(r#"export PATH="{install_dir}:$PATH""#),
74:     }
75: }
76: 
77: fn planned_setup_lines(
78:     shell: &str,
79:     install_dir: Option<&str>,
80:     path_env: &str,
81:     rc_content: &str,
82: ) -> Vec<String> {
83:     let mut lines_to_add: Vec<String> = Vec::new();
84: 
85:     if let Some(install_dir) = install_dir {
86:         let in_path = path_env.split(':').any(|p| p == install_dir);
87:         let already_in_rc = rc_content.contains(install_dir);
88:         if !in_path && !already_in_rc {
89:             lines_to_add.push(path_export_line(shell, install_dir));
90:         }
91:     }
92: 
93:     let init_line = shell_init_line(shell);
94:     let already_has_init = rc_content.contains("ez shell-init");
95:     if !already_has_init {
96:         lines_to_add.push(init_line);
97:     }
98: 
99:     lines_to_add
100: }
101: 
102: pub fn run(yes: bool) -> Result<()> {
103:     let shell = detect_shell();
104: 
105:     let Some(shell) = shell else {
106:         bail!(
107:             "could not detect shell from $SHELL\n  → Set $SHELL or manually add `eval \"$(ez shell-init)\"` to your shell config"
108:         );
109:     };
110: 
111:     let Some(rc_path) = rc_file_for(&shell) else {
112:         bail!(
113:             "could not determine rc file for shell `{shell}`\n  → Manually add `eval \"$(ez shell-init)\"` to your shell config"
114:         );
115:     };
116: 
117:     let rc_display = rc_path
118:         .to_str()
119:         .unwrap_or("shell config")
120:         .replace(&std::env::var("HOME").unwrap_or_default(), "~");
121: 
122:     // Read existing rc file content (or empty if it doesn't exist).
123:     let rc_content = std::fs::read_to_string(&rc_path).unwrap_or_default();
124: 
125:     let install_dir = std::env::current_exe()
126:         .ok()
127:         .and_then(|exe| exe.parent().and_then(|p| p.to_str().map(str::to_string)));
128:     let lines_to_add = planned_setup_lines(
129:         &shell,
130:         install_dir.as_deref(),
131:         &std::env::var("PATH").unwrap_or_default(),
132:         &rc_content,
133:     );
134: 
135:     if lines_to_add.is_empty() {
136:         ui::success(&format!("Shell already configured in {rc_display}"));
137:         mark_setup_done()?;
138:         return Ok(());
139:     }
140: 
141:     // Show what we'll add.
142:     ui::info(&format!("Will add to {rc_display}:"));
143:     for line in &lines_to_add {
144:         eprintln!("  {line}");
145:     }
146: 
147:     if !yes && !ui::confirm("Add these lines?") {
148:         ui::info("Cancelled — add manually if needed");
149:         return Ok(());
150:     }
151: 
152:     // Append to rc file.
153:     let mut append = String::new();
154:     append.push_str("\n# ez-stack shell integration\n");
155:     for line in &lines_to_add {
156:         append.push_str(line);
157:         append.push('\n');
158:     }
159: 
160:     std::fs::OpenOptions::new()
161:         .create(true)
162:         .append(true)
163:         .open(&rc_path)?;
164:     std::fs::write(&rc_path, format!("{rc_content}{append}"))?;
165: 
166:     mark_setup_done()?;
167: 
168:     ui::success(&format!("Updated {rc_display}"));
169:     ui::hint(&format!("Restart your shell or run: source {rc_display}"));
170: 
171:     Ok(())
172: }
